steps.title: Square both sides
steps.content:
The question asks for $x-2$, and the equation already has $x-2$ inside the square root. Square both sides of the equation.
$$(\sqrt{x-2})^2=3^2$$

steps.title: Find the target expression
steps.content:
Squaring gives
$$x-2=9$$
This matches choice C. The answer is C.
